chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2620 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ : «أَكْرَهُ أَنْ يَنَامَ اَلْمُحْرِمُ عَلَى اَلْفِرَاشِ اَلْأَصْفَرِ أَوِ اَلْمِرْفَقَةِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2620 - Abu Basir narrated from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
"I dislike for a Muhrim to sleep on a yellow mattress or a yellow cushion."
